## Manual QA Checklist

Checklist:
- [x] `ResourceSystemHost` and `AttributeSystemHost` appear after `SaveManager` in `project.godot`.
- [x] Resource events are inspected in runtime logs for changed/cap_changed/overflow ordering.
- [x] Attribute base_changed and unregistered events are inspected in runtime logs.
- [x] Performance tests are run on Godot 4.6.2 when available.

---

## Smoke Test Scope

1. Five MVP resources register with zero current values.
2. Capped and uncapped resource additions return correct actual-added values.
3. Attribute final value uses ModifierEngine target `entity.attr`.
4. Snapshot/restore round-trips ResourceSystem caps before current values.

---

## Playtest Requirements

No playtest sessions required. Sprint 5 is data/service infrastructure; UI-facing implications are deferred to HUD.
